chapter_title.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الْمَلَّاحِينَ وَ الْمُكَارِينَ وَ أَصْحَابِ الصَّيْدِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى ضَيْعَتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 80 – The sailors, and the Hirers, and the hunters, and the man who goes out to his estate

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/388)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/388)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الرَّجُلُ يَكُونُ لَهُ الضِّيَاعُ بَعْضُهَا قَرِيبٌ مِنْ بَعْضٍ يَخْرُجُ فَيُقِيمُ فِيهَا يُتِمُّ أَوْ يُقَصِّرُ قَالَ يُتِمُّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin ShAzaan, from Muhammad Bin Abu Umeyr, from Abdul Rahman who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The man happens to have estates for him, some of them nearer than the others. He goes out and stays in them. Should he pray complete (Salāt) or shorten?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Complete’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan, from Muhammad ibn abu ‘Umayr, from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al- Hajjaj who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who has certain country estates which are near each other to which he goes and stays. Is he required to perform his Salah (prayer) as complete or reduced? He (the Imam) said, ‘He is required to perform his Salah (prayer) as complete.’”
